channel.title: Posts on Juanma Córdoba
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Juanma Córdoba

item.title: Gadgets: TP-Link 1200 Repetidor Wifi
item.description: This post talks about the amazing TP-Link 1200 Repetidor Wifi which has made possible to have internet connection in the last room of my house.

item.title: Books: Accelerate
item.description: Accelerate is a book that I want to highlight among all the books I read in 2020.

item.title: Let's go!
item.description: It should be the 10th blog I start. Right now, I feel this time I have some things to say and some things to test as well.
